item.title: [Segurança] CISA Adds Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20182 to KEV After Admin Access Exploits
item.description:
🚨 CISA Adds Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20182 to KEV After Admin Access Exploits
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The U.S.Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Thursday added a newly disclosed vulnerability impacting Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, requiring Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to remediate the issue by May 17, 2026. The vulnerability is a critical authentication bypass tracked as CVE-2026-20182.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cisa-adds-cisco-sd-wan-cve-2026-20182.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-41702 - VMware
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41702 - VMware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
VMware Fusion contains a TOCTOU (Time-of-check Time-of-use) vulnerability that occurs during an operation performed by a SETUID binary. A malicious actor with local non-administrative user privileges may exploit this vulnerability to escalate privileges to root on the system where Fusion is installed.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41702

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-42602 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-42602 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
azureauthextension is the Azure Authenticator Extension. From 0.124.0 to 0.150.0, a server-side authentication bypass in azureauthextension allows any party who holds a single valid Azure access token for any scope the collector's configured identity can mint for to authenticate to any OpenTelemetry receiver that uses auth: azure_auth. The extension's Authenticate method does not validate incoming bearer tokens as JW...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42602

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Nginx Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (CVE-2026-42945) Notice - Security Boulevard
item.description:
🚨 Nginx Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (CVE-2026-42945) Notice - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42945 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOdTFzNmJWbmJjNEhlXzNrZ3lCMDFKZXdNYW95VTE4LXRFeElNNS1kSEhWZ2ZfRHhZdERBbWt1WmlOY1E3ZVpWUkVBdzY1Y1M5MmJieXE5dmQxSHFmWnVLN2UzZkN3LWtoQ0FUWVpka1RuS0wyWUtrd3lqTng3M3E3eVBINllMWllDV3lLT2lyekhrTXVJeVdLMW4zVF80NHpzR0xQeA?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] On-Prem Microsoft Exchange Server CVE-2026-42897 Exploited via Crafted Email
item.description:
🚨 On-Prem Microsoft Exchange Server CVE-2026-42897 Exploited via Crafted Email
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
Microsoft has disclosed a new security vulnerability impacting on-premise versions of Exchange Server that it said has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-42897 (CVSS score: 8.1), has been described as a spoofing bug stemming from a cross-site scripting flaw. An anonymous researcher has been credited with discovering and reporting the issue.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/on-prem-microsoft-exchange-server-cve.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-40893 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-40893 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.2
Resumo:
Gotenberg is a Docker-powered stateless API for PDF files. Prior to 8.31.0, Gotenberg only checks if the tag is exactly FileName, so System:FileName slips right through and ExifTool happily renames the file. This allows remote attackers to move, rename, and change permissions for arbitrary files.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40893

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-40460 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-40460 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
When NGINX Plus or NGINX Open Source are configured to use the HTTP/3 QUIC module, an attacker may be able to spoof their source IP address allowing for bypass of authorization or bypass of rate limiting. Note: Software versions which have reached End of Technical Support (EoTS) are not evaluated.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40460

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-5486 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-5486 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The Unlimited Elements for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'data[filter_search]' parameter in the get_cat_addons AJAX action in versions up to and including 2.0.7. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and the use of deprecated escaping functions combined with direct string concatenation in SQL query construction. The vulnerability is exacerbated because the normalizeAja...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5486

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2020-37169 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2020-37169 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
WordPress Plugin ultimate-member 2.1.3 contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to include arbitrary files by manipulating the pack parameter in class-admin-upgrade.php. Attackers can send POST requests with malicious pack values to include unintended PHP files from the packages directory and execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2020-37169

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-43480 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-43480 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ASoC: amd: acp3x-rt5682-max9836: Add missing error check for clock acquisition The acp3x_5682_init() function did not check the return value of clk_get(), which could lead to dereferencing error pointers in rt5682_clk_enable(). Changing clk_get() to the device-managed devm_clk_get(). Adding proper IS_ERR() checks for both clock acquisitions.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43480

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-15345 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-15345 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
The MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'map' parameter in the display-map shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.27 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performin...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15345

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-0249 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-0249 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Multiple improper certificate validation vulnerabilities in the Palo Alto Networks GlobalProtect™ app enables an attacker to intercept encrypted communications and potentially compromise the endpoint. This can enable a local non-administrative operating system user or an attacker on the same subnet to redirect traffic to an unauthorized server and facilitate the installation of malicious software. The GlobalProtect a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0249

item.title: [Segurança] Microsoft warns of Exchange zero-day flaw exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 Microsoft warns of Exchange zero-day flaw exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
On Thursday, Microsoft shared mitigations for a high-severity Exchange Server vulnerability exploited in attacks that allow threat actors to execute arbitrary code via cross-site scripting (XSS) while targeting Outlook on the web users.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-warns-of-exchange-zero-day-flaw-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers exploit auth bypass flaw in Burst Statistics WordPress plugin
item.description:
💣 Hackers exploit auth bypass flaw in Burst Statistics WordPress plugin
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are leveraging a critical authentication bypass vulnerability in the WordPress plugin Burst Statistics to obtain admin-level access to websites.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-auth-bypass-flaw-in-burst-statistics-wordpress-plugin/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Monetizing Zero-Trust Security with VCF 9.1 and VMware vDefend
item.description:
📰 Monetizing Zero-Trust Security with VCF 9.1 and VMware vDefend
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
As a Cloud Service Provider, your value proposition is shifting. It’s no longer just about providing “space” for workloads; it’s about providing a secure, high-performance platform for the AI era. With the launch of VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1, VMware vDefend introduces critical enhancements that allow you to deliver self-service, high-performance lateral security across both …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloudprovider/2026/05/monetizing-zero-trust-security-with-vcf-9-1-and-vmware-vdefend.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Expand Shared VMDKs with Clustered Applications in VMware vSAN for VCF 9.1
item.description:
📰 Expand Shared VMDKs with Clustered Applications in VMware vSAN for VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
While VMware vSphere and vSAN provide a common and consistent way of delivering high availability of your applications and data through virtualization, it is not uncommon to see customers using application-level clustering capabilities in a virtualized environment. In vSAN for VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1, we’ve made the management of these clustered applications much easier.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/15/expand-shared-vmdks-in-vmware-vsan-for-vcf-9-1/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Fragnesia Linux kernel local privilege escalation vulnerability mitigations

In these regular emails you will find the latest updates about Ubuntu and upcoming events where you can meet our team. Close Your preferences have been successfully updated. Close notification Please try again or file a bug report. Close Blog A local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability affecting the Linux kernel has...
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/fragnesia-linux-vulnerability-fixes-available
